violations.text: Various foods were observed held at 42-43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The condensate from the espresso machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

Various foods were observed held at 47-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting (being held together with tape). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
Prep unit was not in good repair, ambient observed at 47F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
The condensate from the espresso machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

The floor and wall junctures in the mop sink area and back door have missing/cracked tiles. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

Various foods were observed held at 48-51 degrees Fahrenheit in prep unit. Inspector observed foods stacked, ambient temperature was observed at 49F. PIC removed stacked foods to another unit, ambient temperature was observed at 41F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Reviewed proper cold holding procedures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

Beef was observed thawing in a container of stagnant water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Inspector observed tape holding it together. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026
The condensate from the espresso machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

The floor and wall junctures in the mop sink area and back door have missing tiles. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026
The condensate from the expresso machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

Establishment did not have a person in charge that has successfully completed an approved food safety certification course. Please email inspector proof that additional employees have been enrolled and completed an approved food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Food was observed held at 47-50 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge ham and linguica had been out of temperature for an unknown amount of time. Ham and linguica were voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Per person in charge, sausage had been out of temperature for approximately 3 hours. Sausage was relocated to bottom of prep unit to cool. Food was observed stored over the fill line. Establishment must not fill the containers over the fill line. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
The condensate from the expresso machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
